title: The Sons’ Cups — Part 2
description: The future Straw Hat Grand Fleet leaders offer their loyalty to Luffy.
scene: On pages 7–11, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Sai, Colosseum Fighters, Straw Hat Pirates gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Prepare yourself, Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Set sail! We're coming right after you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There isn't a hint of anger in their voices!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's going on! Sure is noisy back there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's the people of Dressrossa! What could they possibly want now!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Get back here, Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait, everyone! Rebecca's been discovered in that house on the hill!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: She's with Lord Kyros!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We all know, silly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It was only a matter of time till she lol- lowed Lord kyros once he resigned from his post at the Royal Family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I mean, duh, the two of them are father and daughter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What a eat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The adults of this country have all known this for 16 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: lady scarlet and the two of them were living happily in that house on the hill.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We were also aware of the true identity of this country's "fairies,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We just kept our mouths shut and acted like we were oblivious to both secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Heh?!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Anyway, just keep running! We've got to let the Saviors of this country flee safely!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Wait til we get our hands on you, Lucy! Return Rebecca this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I have a few more of the things you have ever seen.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: If we all crowd around Lucy,

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: FUJITORA can't bring down all the rubble he's got floating up there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Where you do think you're going, you many bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: You really are honest to a fault, aren't you, Straw Hat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The whole country's out to save you... just exactly what kind of person are you? What color is your hair? What kind of eyes do you have?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: And what are the contours of your face?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I... I wish I hadn't closed these eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I'd have enjoyed taking a good look at you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Surely you have quite the kind face."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Well now, I'm in quite the pickle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: All these weapons I've raised...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Don't seem to be worth a damn any more.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ISSHOU-SAN, WHAT IN THE WORLD ARE YOU DOING!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: All troops have fallen back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: But the people of the country have all rushed into the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: How long are you going to keep all of that floating debris up there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Now wwwwwww...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Feast yer eyes on her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Oooh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: It's Ginormous !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Ain't she a beauty!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: She ain't even yours, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Quickly, get on board! Time is of the essence here!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Yonta Maria Grand Fleet, Flagship, the Yonta Maria

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I'll show you my ship later! You're gonna wet yourselves, I swear!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Straw Hat! I've got four Mercury friends that are also giants!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: with their help, one day, we'll get together the giant tribes,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: And reform that crew that shook the world, the giant pirate crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Heh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Wow! Sounds awesome! I'd hate to have to go up against that! Looks like we might be seeing each other somewhere down the road!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: The giant pirate crew! This means master Dorry and Master Brogie's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: days of glory have finally come, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Aah, it'd be nice to go to Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: And our yotta Maria Grand Fleet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: A 56-ship- strong armada! It should be of use to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: of use?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Luffyland! We've gotten permission from chief fonts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: We'd like you to include us as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Include?

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
